_publications._publicationTitle: Neuroanatomical correlates of working memory performance in Neurofibromatosis 1.

_contextSnippet: In the region-of-interest analysis, NF1 patients showed significantly greater volume of the lentiform nuclei compared with healthy controls
details: Region-of-interest analysis using marsbar revealed NF1 patients showed significantly greater volume of the lentiform nuclei compared with healthy controls, but no significant correlation between lentiform nuclei volumes and working memory factors (FAC1 r = −0.01, P = 0.98; FAC2 r = −.15, P = 0.45; FAC3 r = 0.26, P = 0.17)
